result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity op ON op.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = op.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;': no such table: sales_pipeline.Opportunity"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity op ON op.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = op.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity op ON op.AccountId = o.AccountId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = op.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.TotalPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.TotalPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= CAST('2022-06-25' AS DATE)
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= CAST('2022-11-25' AS DATE)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= CAST('2022-06-25' AS DATE)
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= CAST('2022-11-25' AS DATE)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;
